name: skydog-gps
description: SkyDog GPS — adventure tracker by SkyDog AI

scripts.ios:setup: npm install && npx cap add ios
scripts.ios:sync: mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.json sw.js icon-192.png icon-512.png apple-touch-icon.png favicon.png skydog-logo.png www/ && npx cap sync ios

author: SkyDog
